data.name: Twiwood Tales
data.detailed_description:
A dark forest is ahead of you.

It feels familiar, but you hesitate.

Only scraps and glimpses remain.

Step inside. Make a choice.

Remember your purpose... or remember what you were trying to forget.

Were you searching for something, or running from it?

The Twiwood Forest

Twiwood Tales is a rogue-like RPG with seductive tension, branching paths, and combat system that rewards planning, awareness, timing, and creativity. Whether you're here for the fight, the story, or something more intimate, the forest welcomes you.

A Dangerous Path

Each run offers new routes, risks, and rewards. Some will test your focus. Others, your patience. Every step takes you closer to your goal, but danger awaits at every fork. Build yourself for the journey, and make use of your defenses if you want to come out on top. 

Twiwood Tales builds on classic turn-based JRPG combat, but with a twist: you can actively defend yourself... or choose not to. For some - timing is everything. For others, a strong body and a sturdy shield are more than enough.

Not Every weapon is Steel

Spells and steel will keep you alive, but seductive Techniques offer their own kind of power  and their own way of dealing with enemies. What you choose to do with your foes is entirely  up to you.

Many enemies rely on seductive Techniques, bending the flow of battle in ways you won’t always see coming.

Moments that Linger

Some encounters leave more than scars. Lingering flashes of animated memories, once lost,  may find their way into your hands. Perhaps they'll help you remember. Or offer a bright moment on a long, dark path.

FEATURES

  • Strategic turn-based combat with real-time block, parry & dodge

  • Rogue-like progression with randomized maps and branching paths

  • Dynamic enemy encounters with unique attack patterns and weaknesses

  • Build variety with dozens of unique items, erotic techniques, and magical spells

  • Adult content integrated with gameplay

  • 14+ fully animated interactive adult scenes (8+ in Early Access)

  • 60+ handcrafted sex poses with free control

  • 10 Unique mid-battle seductive techniques

  • Hot events, puzzles, and risky choices. It's not always about the fight

  • Seasonal events and exclusive rewards

  • Full voice acting planned for 1.0 release

  • NO AI, Original art, writing, and gameplay

  • Free playable demo available

Enter Twiwood

Twiwood Tales is not a quick tease, it's a handcrafted debut with an original, non-cliche story, uniquely arousing scenes, and bold combat system. Enter the Twiwood Forest, follow your desires, and shape your path.

data.short_description: A journey through a rogue-like forest filled with naughty and dangerous creatures, active animated love scenes, erotic combat skills, witty encounters, and mystery!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-4790K CPU 4.00 GHz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
